title: Successful Login - UI
description: Verify successful user authentication via the UI.
preconditions: User is on the login page

steps.expectedResult: User is redirected to the post-login experience.

expectedOutcome: User is successfully logged in and sees the dashboard.

title: Successful Login - API
description: Verify successful user authentication via the API.

steps.action: Send POST request to /api/auth/login with valid credentials

expectedOutcome: API returns a valid authentication token and user details.

title: Invalid Credentials - UI
description: Verify error message is displayed for invalid credentials.
preconditions: User is on the login page

steps.action: Enter invalid password 'WrongPass!' with valid username

expectedOutcome: Login is rejected and a user-visible error message is shown.

title: Invalid Credentials - API
description: Verify API rejects login with invalid credentials.

steps.action: Send POST request to /api/auth/login with invalid password

expectedOutcome: API returns an error indicating unauthorized access.

title: Mandatory Fields - UI
description: Verify form validation for empty required fields.
preconditions: User is on the login page

steps.action: Leave username and password fields empty

steps.expectedResult: An error message indicating required fields is displayed or form does not submit.

expectedOutcome: User sees guidance indicating required fields are missing.

title: Malformed Request - API
description: Verify API rejects malformed login request.

steps.action: Send POST request to /api/auth/login with missing password field

expectedOutcome: API returns an error detailing the missing required field.

title: Locked Account - UI
description: Verify locked account login attempt shows appropriate message.
preconditions: User is on the login page

steps.action: Enter valid username 'locked.user@example.com' and any password

steps.expectedResult: A specific error message regarding account lock is displayed.

expectedOutcome: Login is blocked and a clear message indicates the account is locked.

title: Locked Account - API
description: Verify API response for a locked account.

steps.action: Send POST request to /api/auth/login with locked account credentials

expectedOutcome: API returns an error indicating the account is locked or disabled.
